CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Tina Paxton, CSR#1558. (212)

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Rebekah Sachs' motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process.
